overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character holding a torch while running through an ancient Egyptian harbor at night. The character moves along stone docks past wooden ships and scaffolding, then ascends a large monumental staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor dock with wooden scaffolding and ships

agents.ego_description: running forward along the stone dock path holding a torch, approaching the large obelisk monument ahead

entered.detail: tall wooden construction scaffolding along the right side of the dock path
large wooden ships with sails docked at the harbor on the right side
tall dark stone obelisk or monument rising in the distance ahead
palm trees visible in the distance against the night sky
wide stone tiled pathway forming the dock walkway

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a stone dock pathway at night, holding a torch that illuminates the immediate surroundings. Wooden scaffolding lines the right side while ancient ships with sails are docked nearby. Ahead rises a large stone obelisk monument against the dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central obelisk and waterfront transition

events.description: character turns right toward the waterfront, shifting view from the obelisk to the harbor water

agents.ego_description: running through the open plaza area and executing a right turn toward the waterfront, passing the obelisk

entered.detail: wooden fence barriers appearing along the right side near the water
low stone wall marking the edge of the dock
dark water of the harbor becoming visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the open plaza past the obelisk, which shifts to the left side of the frame. Around the 28-second mark, the character turns right toward the waterfront, revealing the harbor water and wooden fencing along the quay wall. The ships that were on the right are now visible on the left.

agents.ego_description: running along the waterfront promenade with water on the right and docked ships on the left

entered.detail: wooden defensive barricades or fencing on the far left side
wide stone staircase leading upward becoming visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the waterfront promenade, with the dark harbor water immediately to the right and ancient ships docked on the left. The stone quay wall runs along the water's edge. In the distance ahead, a large stone staircase leading upward comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental staircase with large stone statues

events.description: character begins ascending the large stone stairs, changing from horizontal to vertical movement

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase upward, passing a large stone statue on the right

entered.detail: large stone statue or monument base with seated figure on the right side of the stairs
tall stone walls lining the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending the monumental stone staircase, leaving the waterfront behind. A large stone statue on a pedestal stands prominently on the right side of the stairs. The character climbs steadily upward, with stone walls on the left and wooden scaffolding visible at the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit Egyptian harbor that shifts from a narrow dockside path to an expansive waterfront plaza. It begins with the character running along a stone pathway, where a handheld torch casts flickering light on wooden scaffolding and docked ships. As the character advances, the view opens up to reveal a towering stone obelisk that looms against the dark blue night sky before shifting to the left of the frame. The scene then expands as the character turns right toward the quay, transitioning the perspective to overlook the harbor water and wooden fencing. Finally, the layout of the harbor reorients, leaving the previously encountered ships positioned to the left as the character moves deeper into the open plaza.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a low-lying waterfront promenade to the ascent of a monumental stone staircase. It begins by tracking the character along a stone quay, with dark harbor waters to the right and ancient ships docked on the left. As the character moves forward, the open vista of the promenade narrows and the path shifts toward a large stone staircase appearing in the distance. The scene then opens upward as the character begins the climb, passing a large stone statue on a pedestal to the right while leaving the waterfront behind. The movement concludes with a steady ascent between stone walls, finally revealing wooden scaffolding at the top of the stairs.
